glosses.ja: 招集する; 召喚する

translations.en: The teacher is calling us in tomorrow.
translations.es: El profesor nos cita para mañana.
translations.de: Der Lehrer bestellt uns für morgen ein.
translations.it: Il professore ci convoca per domani.
translations.pt: O professor nos convoca para amanhã.
translations.vi: Giáo viên gọi chúng tôi tới vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: De leraar roept ons morgen bij zich.
translations.hi: अध्यापक हमें कल बुला रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ο καθηγητής μας καλεί για αύριο.
translations.nb: Læreren kaller oss inn i morgen.
translations.sv: Läraren kallar in oss i morgon.
translations.cs: Učitel nás zítra volá k sobě.
translations.da: Læreren kalder os ind i morgen.
translations.ja: 先生が私たちを明日呼び出します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'prof' as subject.
Common noun, masculine singular; colloquial for 'teacher/professor'; subject of the clause.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person plural; direct object of 'convoque'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Le prof'.
Adverb of time; modifies the whole clause.

translations.en: We’re going to call in the whole team.
translations.es: Vamos a convocar a todo el equipo.
translations.de: Wir werden das gesamte Team einbestellen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把整个团队叫来。
translations.yue: 我哋會叫晒成個團隊過嚟。
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לזמן את כל הצוות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ triệu tập toàn bộ đội ngũ.
translations.nl: We gaan het hele team bij elkaar roepen.
translations.hu: Az egész csapatot be fogjuk hívni.
translations.hi: हम पूरी टीम को बुलाने वाले हैं.
translations.nb: Vi skal kalle inn hele teamet.
translations.sv: Vi ska kalla in hela teamet.
translations.ja: 私たちはチーム全員を呼び出すつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 3rd person singular; often used for colloquial 'we'.
Auxiliary 'aller', present indicative 3rd singular; forms near-future with infinitive.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the auxiliary 'va'.
Quantifying determiner, feminine singular; modifies the noun phrase.
Elided definite article before vowel, feminine singular; clitic form attached orthographically.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the direct object 'toute l’équipe'.

sentences.target: Vous convoquez les parents cet après-midi.

translations.fr: Vous convoquez les parents cet après-midi.
translations.en: You’re calling the parents in this afternoon.
translations.es: Ustedes convocan a los padres esta tarde.
translations.de: Ihr bestellt heute Nachmittag die Eltern ein.
translations.it: Voi convocate i genitori questo pomeriggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们今天下午把家长叫来。
translations.yue: 你哋今日下晝叫家長過嚟。
translations.pt: Vocês convocam os pais hoje à tarde.
translations.he: אתם מזמנים את ההורים היום אחר הצהריים.
translations.tr: Siz bugün öğleden sonra velileri çağırıyorsunuz.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang gọi phụ huynh đến vào chiều nay.
translations.ar: أنتم تستدعون أولياء الأمور بعد ظهر اليوم.
translations.nl: Jullie laten vanmiddag de ouders langskomen.
translations.hu: Ti ma délután behívjátok a szülőket.
translations.hi: आप आज दोपहर माता-पिता को बुला रहे हैं.
translations.el: Εσείς καλείτε τους γονείς σήμερα το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Dere kaller inn foreldrene i ettermiddag.
translations.id: Kalian memanggil para orang tua sore ini.
translations.sv: Ni kallar in föräldrarna i eftermiddag.
translations.ro: Voi convocați părinții în această după-amiază.
translations.ja: あなたたちは今日の午後に保護者を呼び出します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person plural (or formal singular); subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; agrees with 'Vous'.
Definite article, plural; introduces 'parents' as direct object.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'convoquez'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (form used before vowel sound); modifies 'après-midi'.
Compound noun used as a time expression; adverbial modifier of the clause.

sentences.target: Ils me convoquent au bureau maintenant.

translations.fr: Ils me convoquent au bureau maintenant.
translations.en: They’re calling me into the office now.
translations.es: Me están llamando a la oficina ahora.
translations.de: Sie rufen mich jetzt ins Büro.
translations.it: Mi stanno chiamando in ufficio adesso.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们现在叫我去办公室。
translations.yue: 佢哋而家叫我入去辦公室。
translations.ru: Они сейчас вызывают меня в офис.
translations.pt: Eles estão me chamando para o escritório agora.
translations.vi: Họ đang gọi tôi vào văn phòng ngay bây giờ.
translations.nl: Ze roepen me nu naar kantoor.
translations.uk: Вони зараз викликають мене до офісу.
translations.hi: वे अभी मुझे दफ्तर में बुला रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Oni teraz wzywają mnie do biura.
translations.nb: De kaller meg inn på kontoret nå.
translations.id: Mereka sedang memanggil saya ke kantor sekarang.
translations.sv: De kallar in mig till kontoret nu.
translations.ro: Ei mă cheamă la birou acum.
translations.cs: Volají si mě teď do kanceláře.
translations.da: De kalder mig ind på kontoret nu.
translations.ja: 今、彼らは私をオフィスに呼び出しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object of 'convoquent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Ils'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing the locative phrase 'au bureau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' in 'au bureau'.
Adverb of time; situates the action in the present.
